name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Early voting is just two days away and I want to thank our outstanding volunteer team for the hard work they are doing in Texas' 7th District. Yesterday, Team Hunt volunteers were making phone calls and knocking doors to share our message and energize voters to support our campaign at the ballot box. I was once again blown away by the number of volunteers who participated in our third Day of Action. Thank you to everyone who has contributed their time to our campaign, you are helping us bring positive change to the 7th District!

Early voting begins on Tuesday, and tomorrow at 5:30pm, I hope you can join me, Dan Crenshaw and other local candidates for a special Early Voting GOTV Rally!

On Thursday I joined the hardworking members of Houston's Associated Builders and Contractors for a productive conversation regarding opportunities and challenges facing Houston small businesses. In order to encourage economic growth and opportunity, our elected leaders should be responsive to the input and perspectives of our entrepreneurs. I am proud to have earned ABC's support in my campaign in Texas' 7th Congressional District and I look forward to working with them in the future.

On Friday, I released a new television advertisement: "[Service](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=faeb72873d7c48028450dc4db05a0cc2&_e=BVpIKf-AIpe0L7XYZdDx1Z7zhS9f_S-WswkWPqD4tk1e_tGFDKXOdOyh29Rk9xSV9Ek_zGu43UIWfqjz6roMrnzNHABk4192VLvPQWkukY4A19NSb5w7Gw73JVT4kUtaTZUq_VJHKZ-zGFNKEZ13Y_HENl3DkGpgcFgqb7s_JF89APAT9jcqvbtBSlRdGdmn5J0QHZY9DfQodbWGj57BSfSnbNy5CfmpHn1sTWGABP2s3VZOzRl4G7mziJ9Qs7yQlBK_suq3PACSebkx9l5FMSixTzadfGWRWxHWkIHtIDKFDq4Pa5s9PsPm8hsVuknL)." My mother is the strongest person I know, and she has taught me to serve selflessly, be resilient, and lead with integrity. As our country copes with today's discord and division, my mother's lessons have equipped me to see beyond the challenges we face today and into a brighter future for all Americans.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=faeb72873d7c48028450dc4db05a0cc2&_e=BVpIKf-AIpe0L7XYZdDx1Z7zhS9f_S-WswkWPqD4tk1e_tGFDKXOdOyh29Rk9xSV9Ek_zGu43UIWfqjz6roMrnzNHABk4192VLvPQWkukY5etI92IFoNDemv4blcH1LJ6r-69HuDO9aWwjbRjKuf-Iw2NyTS1IFptXhy3hCBlX56-PVMFgeZAEZ9CGq33IiGXhkVzE_lVV_myMbLbPOhiErmyrf_2tJ4xEjbTRvp1bYqfSRP00zjuTU1S_9GJ3WtULLBj-8gR8gZ4GvRMipiYCy0fxr3Hl8fxJ_CzNRJY-bv-cvY8sZOUPC7t6dx_8Hd)

And, on Friday [I was honored to accept a debate](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=faeb72873d7c48028450dc4db05a0cc2&_e=BVpIKf-AIpe0L7XYZdDx1f8Xrx-7yp2EZJnzFXaGWCbs7fUojqvbx7koYbf8aywcvP68ugUU9Igryc-0fO75E0rt8_zBYgmxXQkLfFm6lxw60c0DXFOPH4RNWZ0sXOrnx0vV2GUKVd7tHYW5TxcPJRBFXMWhxeTsdjr13TxBP1YclbRAUAQJ1_mhnw_H9ngfnOqAw4lPCkOA0pE6iragJADKvIDTOLRg-ipg83bp03oGg14GpIr4E6LWWAQ2y6rgBjIXXZ6A_Z-IoxDogKt2AfN6KldeODB1oQy_UUPWEB3XjJfXN_FBPTP4usBIm6L418E1NHJv_YfFEF3DZGaIIiSLL58o4uA5XbjC9h1OcEA%3D) hosted by the 6 Mayors of the Memorial Villages. This nonpartisan coalition of local leaders has offered to host an open debate overseen by a nonpartisan moderator. The residents of the 7th District have a right to hear their candidates debate the issues and defend their positions. I am honored to accept this debate invitation and I hope my opponent will do the same.

We are now in the homestretch to Election Day and I am more optimistic than ever before about our path to victory in November. Our goals and objectives would not be attainable without your continued support. I am so glad you have chosen to support Team Hunt and will continue to work every day to earn your trust and your vote.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=faeb72873d7c48028450dc4db05a0cc2&_e=BVpIKf-AIpe0L7XYZdDx1Vs5DjSJBOZ0KcuYC3-1pqPQyazwBS1azMdAsYScZufRByfY1WkHCwOjspnAWnUuHxyi9HjKEt7-9VQLzRxKIuSMMt35UnGpCUKhHyq5i6MR-FMg0czwGmEu7Qo5hjWV7jLD7umix3KbuWZEC-l0uT4TVU4g72r3igMpP5ZwBIMy5vugijRuJG-VUNwz8bVpOOmZwetJNLKH-Gplet4QpXDfKos54HuSn4KgChgc055M8d_pJw7AAOKJpZqEHSoijjceqvXaQyI0pk61leXDZGQ%3D)****

subject: Your response to our survey is critical

body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=92a4de3d28bf1b9d8fe295a00fdc0f39eb87780e3f27acba76cc60b97f172865cae5d93c4d4fb20fc8cb568c8e828cff2b1077a5cf09870d

Friend,

We are in the final stretch of this campaign and nothing is stopping OUR President from WINNING on behalf of the American People.

name: Dean Browning, Chairman
subject: Welcome to Common Sense Solutions Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CSSPAC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Dear Patriot,
Thank you for deciding to take a stand for conservative values and to fight against the radical-left! Here at Common Sense Solutions, we work tirelessly to expose hidden hypocrisies and uncover the truth behind what drives Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and other socialists in the Democrat party. We want to hold Elected Officials accountable, whether they are incumbents or running for office for the first time. CSS Pac seeks to develop and implement conservative, common-sense solutions that will keep Pennsylvania and America Great and build a bright future for all. Businessman and conservative, Dean Browning chairs CSS Pac. Dean worked in the private sector for over 40 years. After retiring, Dean wanted to work to put in place conservative policies that champion the individual and that have been successful in creating an economy that provides unlimited opportunities for everyone. Now, more than ever, we need to protect our economy and those long-standing conservative values that have helped to build such a great country. We are under attack by Leftists such as Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC who seek to bolster the power of the government at the expense of hard-working Americans like yourself. CSS Pac will not back down from any fight that the Radical Left throws at us, and we will not stop until the job is done! We are honored to have you become a part of our team. For Freedom,
CSSPAC Staff
---

Here’s what Hoosiers’ investments have helped us accomplish in the last few months:
1. We started a **voter protection hotline** with legal help ready to thwart any attempts at voter suppression.
2. We hired a **bilingual organizer** to expand our voter and volunteer outreach into Spanish speaking communities.
3. We built a tool to **connect voters with every Democratic candidate** on their ballot.
4. We hired new data staffers and collected early vote locations across the state. Then, we built a tool to **connect Hoosiers with early vote locations** in their area.
5. We purchased software to easily **connect volunteers with events in their area** , expanding our coalition of Hoosiers ready to get out the vote like never before.
6. We’ve produced and shared educational tools to **help voters understand their options** to vote safely.
7. We’ve **hired new staff members and interns** to run a field program designed to educate voters on their candidates and their options to vote safely in 2020. They’ve been on the phones every day recruiting volunteers and talking about our winning message.

The 2020 Safe Voting Initiative is our most groundbreaking GOTV effort to date. It doesn’t stop there. Here’s what is left to get done:
1. We need to invest in software to **reach out to mail-in voters** and make sure they’re getting their applications and ballots in before the deadline.
2. We’re hoping to continue our **massive texting and phonebanking program** to educate voters on their options to vote safely.
3. Our field staffers have a goal of making **hundreds of thousands of calls and sending one million texts** before the election.
4. We need to engage **Democratic lawyers** to help address voter suppression at the county-level.
5. We’ve got to continue to produce and share **voter educational tools** with the help of a legal team.

**[Peter, there has never been a better time to make your first donation. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = Peter, early investments in our campaign have made battlegrounds out of red districts. We’ve built the momentum to flip seats for the first time in decades and beat back Republican gerrymandering for good. But races are won and lost in the last three weeks. If we’re going to send a wave of Dems to office this year, we’ve got just 22 days left to ramp up our efforts and get it done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Here’s what Hoosiers’ investments have helped us accomplish in the last few months: 1. We started a voter protection hotline with legal help ready to thwart any attempts at voter suppression. 2. We hired a bilingual organizer to expand our voter and volunteer outreach into Spanish speaking communities. 3. We built a tool to connect voters with every Democratic candidate on their ballot. 4. We hired new data staffers and collected early vote locations across the state. Then, we built a tool to connect Hoosiers with early vote locations in their area. 5. We purchased software to easily connect volunteers with events in their area , expanding our coalition of Hoosiers ready to get out the vote like never before. 6. We’ve produced and shared educational tools to help voters understand their options to vote safely. 7. We’ve hired new staff members and interns to run a field program designed to educate voters on their candidates and their options to vote safely in 2020. They’ve been on the phones every day recruiting volunteers and talking about our winning message. The 2020 Safe Voting Initiative is our most groundbreaking GOTV effort to date. It doesn’t stop there. Here’s what is left to get done: 1. We need to invest in software to reach out to mail-in voters and make sure they’re getting their applications and ballots in before the deadline. 2. We’re hoping to continue our massive texting and phonebanking program to educate voters on their options to vote safely. 3. Our field staffers have a goal of making hundreds of thousands of calls and sending one million texts before the election. 4. We need to engage Democratic lawyers to help address voter suppression at the county-level. 5. We’ve got to continue to produce and share voter educational tools with the help of a legal team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. Fellow Democrat,
Although we cannot be together in person we can still come together virtually to hear from our elected officials, Democratic Party Leaders, and special guests to celebrate and raise money to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

**West Virginia Democratic Party's Virtual 2020 Roosevelt-Kennedy Celebration.**
**Saturday, October 24, 2020 beginning at 7 p.m.**

_After you[purchase your ticket](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20208961/256086522/1807795429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBhOWMxYy04YjBjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h153jyk25A4XIM2PMdTzN5RpoqRESaSq5wgOdTIrdrI=), we will send you a link to register/join the event. This information will be sent to you the week of the event._
All support from this fundraiser will go to electing Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020.
[**Right now the special ticket price is $25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20208962/256086523/1807795429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBhOWMxYy04YjBjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h153jyk25A4XIM2PMdTzN5RpoqRESaSq5wgOdTIrdrI=) and more information will become available about our event this coming week, but go ahead and purchase your ticket so that we can immediately gain more funds for our GOTV efforts across the state ahead of Early Voting!
Stay tuned for information on who will be joining us that night!
If you have further questions about the event please contact events@wvdemocrats.com.
For press inquiries contact Brittni@WVDemocrats.com.
Please click this link to purchase your ticket: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wvdprk2020](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20208963/256086524/1807795429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjBhOWMxYy04YjBjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h153jyk25A4XIM2PMdTzN5RpoqRESaSq5wgOdTIrdrI=)

Sincerely,
_Team WVDP_

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Important Supreme Court & Election Activities! Week of Oct. 12th Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
There are opportunities for action this week on the Supreme Court fight and the election. And, early voting has started in many places, so we have no time to lose!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Supreme Court Action
****PRIORITY #1** Call your Senators About the Supreme Court**
This is a top priority action item this week! Call your Senators and tell them that Judge Barrett deserves a fair hearing and urge them to vote yes to confirm her now, without delay.
**Sample Script**
_Hi, my name is**[Your Name]** , and I live in **[City, State]**. I’m calling to urge the Senator to support Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to confirm her quickly, without delay. Thank you!_
To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial [(202) 224-3121](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AdGVsOjIwMjIyNDMxMjE_bWlkPTQyODA2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=Q9qSHS2f_PBhGyrkstEy_g "tel:2022243121") and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the names of your Senators, use the map on this page. Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators.
****PRIORITY #2** Share the Support Amy Hub Page & Petition**
[Our hub page to support Amy Coney Barrett](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_XDZ5yPrwsqk7YG2A6XNjA) has launched and it’s full of resources to help you support Judge Barrett. Sign the petition, read about Judge Barrett, and more – and then share the link on social media and over email!
[SIGN THE PETITION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3VwcG9ydC1iYXJyZXR0Lz9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=wf4wkBoghPs3TkdIzftZAg)
**Schedule your sign waving events now!**
The sign waving event for today, Monday, October 12th, if possible, should be located outside or near your Senator(s) local office(s), and have a “Confirm Amy” theme. If you aren’t close enough to drive to the local Senate office, hold your sign waving event at a busy intersection in your community.

See the suggested sign messages below, and watch out for updates on themes and messaging. If you organize any events, email us the details (date, time, location, and contact information we can list), and we can send an email to people in your area to help you spread the word. Email us at [support@teapartypatriots.org](mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org").
* **Monday, October 12th** – _The first day of Judge Barrett’s Senate confirmation hearing_
* **Thursday, October 15th** – _The second presidential debate is scheduled, and the last day of Judge Barrett’s hearing_
* **Thursday, October 22nd**

* **Monday, November 2nd** – _Day before Election Day_

Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages:
* Fill the Seat Now!
* Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now!
* Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now!
* #ConfirmAmy
* America supports Amy Coney Barrett!

**Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group**
If you received an email last week with a notice that we are reactivating the Trump Defense Team/Fight Impeachment group, then you are already on this email list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are specific to this Supreme Court seat fight.
[SIGN UP FOR THE GOOGLE GROUP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ncm91cHMuZ29vZ2xlLmNvbS9hL3RlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnL2ZvcnVtLz9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIyFmb3J1bS9zY290dXNkZWZlbmRlcnMvam9pbg&K=vJ4gk64y0PECR6SkKsNowA)
|
---
Get Out the Vote Action
Please sign up to text message voters and help reelect President Trump! It’s so easy!

1. **To get started go to:[tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyODA2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=uiDQeJ9K_tzko5fANlEv1w) **– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

2. **You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

**If you need additional instructions[you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMjBQMlBUZXh0aW5nSW5zdHJ1Y3Rpb25zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VHDge-cRruvxgpQ_lSx22g).** But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.
[START TEXTING](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyODA2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=R0pTYTU0lHkkAFDhSZ6Dfw)
|
---
Sign Up to be a Poll Worker – Deadlines Approaching
The deadlines in some states or counties may have passed, but in some places there is still time to sign up. Use our very short guide to help you figure out if you can still sign up to be a poll worker. There is still a shortage, so if you are able, please sign up!
[DOWNLOAD HOW-TO GUIDE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1BvbGxXb3JrZXJfSG93X1RvX0d1aWRlLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MxuTz1wuHd9K0c4bhkQksQ)
|
---
Pledge to Vote in Person
We’ve now seen multiple instances of large piles of ballots being found in dumpsters, and post office employees being arrested. If you are able, please vote in person, and sign this pledge.

**NOTE:** If you are high-risk and need to stay away from public places for your health, or you live in a state where there is no in-person voting at all (like Washington state), this does not apply to you.
[PLEDGE TO VOTE IN PERSON](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlaW5wZXJzb24uYWN0LnRlYXBhcnR5cGF0cmlvdHMub3JnLz9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Ya5KwMZQXsAUuDIIHLiAzg)
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of October 5th
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are reading (or listening, your choice) to President Reagan’s Farewell Address.**[**You can find the audio and download the text of the speech here.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjg2LTYxOTgyODk3MGZkNzQ4MWI4M2VmMzAxNmE3MjZhMDk2%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmVhZ2FuZm91bmRhdGlvbi5vcmcvcm9uYWxkLXJlYWdhbi9yZWFnYW4tcXVvdGVzLXNwZWVjaGVzL2ZhcmV3ZWxsLWFkZHJlc3MtdG8tdGhlLW5hdGlvbi0yLz9taWQ9NDI4MDYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=h1OWcXwIrWeftoxw92CjvA) After you read/listen to the speech with your kids or grandkids, use the following questions to start a discussion with your family.

**Discussion Questions**
1. In his speech, President Reagan said, “...that's what it was to be an American in the 1980's. We stood, again, for freedom. I know we always have, but in the past few years the world again -- and in a way, we ourselves -- rediscovered it.” Do you think this statement could apply to America right now? How so?
2. What else did President Reagan say that reminds you of what’s happened in America over the last four years?
3. President Reagan also said in this speech, “The lesson of all this was, of course, that because we're a great nation, our challenges seem complex. It will always be this way. But as long as we remember our first principles and believe in ourselves, the future will always be ours.” What are the “first principles” he mentions?
4. “Almost all the world's constitutions are documents in which governments tell the people what their privileges are. Our Constitution is a document in which `We the People' tell the government what it is allowed to do.” Discuss this difference and what that means for America.
5. Discuss President Reagan’s warning about teaching history to American children, and about the importance of an “informed patriotism.” How have things changed or stayed the same since he issued this warning? What can we do about it?

|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

clean_body: | | There are opportunities for action this week on the Supreme Court fight and the election. And, early voting has started in many places, so we have no time to lose! Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Supreme Court Action **PRIORITY #1 Call your Senators About the Supreme Court This is a top priority action item this week! Call your Senators and tell them that Judge Barrett deserves a fair hearing and urge them to vote yes to confirm her now, without delay. Sample Script Hi, my name is[Your Name] , and I live in [City, State]. I’m calling to urge the Senator to support Amy Coney Barrett’s nomination and to confirm her quickly, without delay. Thank you! To call your Senators, no matter the party, simply dial "tel:2022243121" and ask for your Senator by name and you will be connected. If you need to look up the names of your Senators, use the map on this page. Just click on your state and it will show you your Senators. PRIORITY #2 Share the Support Amy Hub Page & Petition has launched and it’s full of resources to help you support Judge Barrett. Sign the petition, read about Judge Barrett, and more – and then share the link on social media and over email! Schedule your sign waving events now! The sign waving event for today, Monday, October 12th, if possible, should be located outside or near your Senator(s) local office(s), and have a “Confirm Amy” theme. If you aren’t close enough to drive to the local Senate office, hold your sign waving event at a busy intersection in your community. See the suggested sign messages below, and watch out for updates on themes and messaging. If you organize any events, email us the details (date, time, location, and contact information we can list), and we can send an email to people in your area to help you spread the word. Email us at mailto:support@teapartypatriots.org "support@teapartypatriots.org". Monday, October 12th – The first day of Judge Barrett’s Senate confirmation hearing Thursday, October 15th – The second presidential debate is scheduled, and the last day of Judge Barrett’s hearing Thursday, October 22nd Monday, November 2nd – Day before Election Day Sample Amy Coney Barrett Sign Messages: Fill the Seat Now! Confirm Amy Coney Barrett now! Amy Coney Barrett loves the Constitution! Fill the Seat Now! #ConfirmAmy America supports Amy Coney Barrett! Sign up for our Supreme Court Action Coalition Group If you received an email last week with a notice that we are reactivating the Trump Defense Team/Fight Impeachment group, then you are already on this email list. If you didn’t receive that email, then you will want to make sure you get signed up for the coalition group that will work to support President Trump’s SCOTUS nominee. You will receive emails with messaging, news, action items, and more that are specific to this Supreme Court seat fight. | Get Out the Vote Action Please sign up to text message voters and help reelect President Trump! It’s so easy! 1. To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. 2. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. If you need additional instructions. But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. | Sign Up to be a Poll Worker – Deadlines Approaching The deadlines in some states or counties may have passed, but in some places there is still time to sign up. Peter,

This election is about more than Trump. It’s about choosing decision makers, and putting them in a place of power. From Sheriff to Schoolboard, from City Council to State Legislature – these are the people that will decide Tennessee’s future, and the TNDP wants to make sure the right people get the jobs. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, to ask for a donation so we can help elect Democrats into positions of power in Tennessee.
Republican leadership in our state has shown time and time again that their loyalties are not to the people of Tennessee. From passing illegal anti-choice legislation in the middle of the night behind locked doors, to coronavirus policies that have put our citizens at risk – the GOP needs to go. Will you please make a donation, right now if you can, to the TNDP and help our efforts to get out the vote? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Will you help us continue to hit our fundraising goals so we can keep reaching out to voters across the district? | ******[Make a Donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/H6_oteqBTd9ZHlM6QfKqVuCDu22ab_cUL5OZdK6zvFg=/YEOIgeGmxLnHPvBfQGs_sLxvRT1Eb98M0xSdWe0TIH8=?refcode=201012-am-email)******
---
Our race is still a toss-up -- meaning it's anyone's to win. **[Can you help me stay ahead of my opponent and the D.C. interests backing her by making a donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/H6_oteqBTd9ZHlM6QfKqVuCDu22ab_cUL5OZdK6zvFg=/YEOIgeGmxLnHPvBfQGs_sLxvRT1Eb98M0xSdWe0TIH8=?refcode=201012-am-email)**
In Congress, I will fight to keep our promises to our seniors by protecting Medicare and Social Security from reckless spending cuts. We can't let D.C. interests pull the rug out from under our friends and neighbors.

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Do it for Christopher Columbus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, We CANNOT allow the radical left to erase our history, remove our statues and rename our cities.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=337A524A1A7115)
---
| | |
---
| | **Friends-

** In the Mayor’s race three years ago we fought de Blasio when he considered taking down the statue of Christopher Columbus at Columbus circle and WON. Today it is landmarked.

Last year, when his wife Chirlane McCray started the ‘She Built NYC’ competition to determine which women would have statues erected in their honor, they denied Mother Frances Cabrini after she received the most votes. [We fought back again](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=337A524A1A7116) and her statue will be unveiled in Lower Manhattan TODAY.

The latest attack on our history and Italian culture comes as Max Rose, Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar and the Squad attempt to rename Washington D.C.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=337A524A1A7117)
---
| | |
---
| | [ KEEP UP THE FIGHT → ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=337A524A1A7118)
---
| | |
---
| | **And** it's not just Christopher Columbus...

In cities across America, leftist protesters are defacing and toppling statues of other historical figures, including Presidents George Washington, Teddy Roosevelt and Abraham Lincoln.

They must be stopped.

We CANNOT allow the radical left to erase our history, remove our statues and rename our cities.

[On this Columbus Day, will you chip in $10 to help me continue the fight?](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=337A524A1A7117)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Indigenous Peoples' Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb1ac3950743/indigenous-peoples-day?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | I went hiking with my kids this weekend at Starved Rock State Park, about seven minutes from my house. The story of Starved Rock is tragic — a group of French settlers in a battle against the indigenous people on whose land they trespassed, and whom they forced up a bluff to either jump or starve. We hike the trails at Starved Rock often and, though this land is protected, I’m always aware that the roads on which we drive, the house in which we live, and the podiums from which I speak are all on stolen land. As we celebrate Indigenous People’s Day, I ask you to consider what kind of leadership the Indigenous People who remain here deserve. I think they deserve acknowledgment, support, gratitude, respect, and reparations. And they deserve representation in Congress who will fight for it. Dani
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7fd5c5f16d&e=140a9b81e7)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bdc6/18e32a7f/4b03b112/7b20b453/2139548905/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

Congressman O’Halleran is an independent voice in the House, working to get things done for the everyday people of Arizona.
He and I are working to slow the spread of COVID-19, make health care more affordable, deliver for our veterans, and clean up Washington.
Wednesday’s pre-election deadline is the last time Tom will report his fundraising numbers and it’s important to show that we can still win rural eastern Arizona in one of our closest House races. That requires your support!
[**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $25 or more to Tom’s campaign and strengthen his next fundraising report. Click here to donate!**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=196907a7d95e424db50e7770942c6fb3&_e=_VxdeOosOLRaypE-mgUUkxonpSNOI70RBMUuNzJVH_uEpax-e7oZPj3q39wwMK8zGt0zwgpHAM47Ahnb_IC4syAxEjgEEG5Mn6hdI9G4iSFzUdajUTNg82SigyiTZmzHlV3xq1K7HUbrNxESs_N9ZZ9WwgcPMPg9UGv7--yBQiWmShG3otnj-jFOuy5fV3JIhGsm5cpTnxreCZdl4f3kM8Fz0L8bu2PcrXxMowrfdQFH8ledKs2dBC8PyjO5OPE3laaHTjHJ-_eGL1pT00xlQ_SOkxJFKkZ6JpKONB4L8qJPo3O9sZDkAgjhIYjHFj-dcm3-yeR6aTP-nG6MvpBw9U12SOLbAAhEiiGZrEFhMb7uyje3pZQUd0hJ__o7N1hsvQpMS2bWubIsxnM-MYkPU2Boy6V3qvF5XO-s5c3ykaRJc45DrnJXxJoYJa4CsDGpVmjLOsbEgPi1-aRipToJlwUlyuCUmDldjcSeg2X6Ch7-z0AmXaqjdxJQ-flqbc2E)
Thanks for helping keep another leader delivering for Arizona in Congress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: UPDATE: Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s Senate confirmation hearings begin
body:
Just yesterday, the nonpartisan American Bar Association (ABA) gave Judge Barrett its highest rating of “well qualified” in a letter sent to the... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ea9ae5fb1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 12, 2020
---
| | |
# **UPDATE: Judge Amy Coney Barrett’s Senate confirmation hearings begin**

**The** **Senate began** its confirmation hearings this morning for Judge Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump’s nominee for Associate Justice of the U.S. Supreme Court.

**Just yesterday,** the nonpartisan American Bar Association (ABA) gave Judge Barrett its highest rating of “well qualified” [**in a letter sent**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=00ceb701b6&e=3ee4985eea) to the Senate Judiciary Committee. Senate Democrats have called the ABA the “gold standard” in rating judicial nominees.

**Judge Barrett’s outstanding record** makes her the perfect candidate for the Court:
* She graduated **top of her class** from Notre Dame Law School and clerked for the late Justice Antonin Scalia.

* She has **extensive experience** across private practice, academia, and public service, including 3 years on the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals.

* She has earned **widespread bipartisan respect** , such as when every full-time member of Notre Dame Law School faculty wrote in support of her confirmation to the Circuit Court in 2017. She has taught at the law school since 2002.

* As a mother of 7, Judge Barrett would bring an important perspective as the **first mother of school-aged children** _ever_ to sit on the U.S. Supreme Court.

**Most important,** as a federal judge, Barrett has already worked faithfully to uphold our Constitution as written. “Judges are not policymakers, and they must be resolute in setting aside any policy views they might hold,” Judge Barrett said upon accepting President Trump’s nomination for the Court last month.

**Sen. Lindsey Graham** , chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, praised Judge Barrett’s exceptional qualifications during his opening statement this morning.

**“I would like the world** and the country to know more about Judge Barrett,” he said. “I’m proud of what you’ve accomplished. I think you’re a great choice by the President.”

**President Trump** was clear about why he chose Judge Barrett for this moment. “To maintain security, liberty, and prosperity, we must preserve our priceless heritage of a nation of laws,” he said. “And there is no one better to do that than Amy Coney Barrett.”

📖 [**Judge** **Barrett will serve the American people with honor and distinction**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b88b61eeec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

---

---

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Leading From The Front On Flood Mitigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Leading From The Front On Flood Mitigation
Houston, TX – The Army Corps of Engineers recently released their interim
mid-point report for the Buffalo Bayou and Tributary Resiliency216 study,
with significant consequences for the 7th Congressional District. This study
has been in development for almost 3 years at a cost of $6 million dollars.

While the study did not make a final recommendation, the course of action
deemed most viable by the Corps is not acceptable to the 7th District. The plan
to widen and deepen Buffalo Bayou has previously been tried and rejected by
local residents and there is no reason to expect that it won’t be rejected
again.

To pursue this course of action will burn precious time that Houstonians don’t
haveand waste government resources. It has been over 3 years since Hurricane
Harvey hit Houston, yet very little action has been taken to prevent the next
natural disaster from devastating our community. We must take another look at
both the tunnel system as well as the clearing and deepening of Addicks and
Barker Reservoirs. And these longer term projects need to be pursued as quickly
as possible. Houston will be hit with another storm and we must be ready.

But even more importantly, our leaders must facilitate cooperation between the
Army Corps and local authorities such as Harris County Flood ControlDistrict
and The City of Houston to facilitate short- and intermediate-term projects
. There are numerous examples of blockages and bottlenecks that continually
cause flooding both upstream and downstreamand many potential areas for select
detention to provide additional storage capacity. The project bottlenecks need
to be fixed as soon as possible and solutions must be built quickly.
Unfortunately, our current Congresswoman has failed to execute these
much-needed flood projects. We need a Member of Congress who roll up their
sleeves and lead from the front, not one who will merely side with the pack.

As an Apache pilot and Army combat veteran, I am intimately familiar with the
operating procedures of the US Army. I will bring the concerns of 7th District
residentsforward and work with the Corps and all vested entities to do what it
takes to solve our problems efficiently and get desperately needed flood
remediation projects built, just as Congressman Dan Crenshaw has done for the 2
nd Congressional district.

After 3 years NOW is the time for ACTION!

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=584375b28c76488db9ed03b6180cb505&_t=kfpeQTCPX_Q71Z5HlCDaPQ_RKVuWwHD0mWbbVXuKnrbBkruGz-DfFXMg08yQnDdI7Y9XH562rhvobWuhRvbKIVHsr1xPapm3WPHcLS1uVwiuaoHg-RqpkzvqXM0GGCqFjqmYkKr1UOxfb0vr8YaDoiM0pJESb8bROpCtijEUnjU%3D>
.

To pursue this course of action will burn precious time that Houstonians don’t haveand waste government resources. name: Team Warner
subject: The Supreme Court and the ACA are on the ballot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

We're just 22 days away from Election Day, and there is so much on the line this year.

We're working hard to re-elect Mark Warner and other Democrats up and down the ballot who are dedicated to protecting the progress we've made in Virginia. But your vote this year is for more than just the people who represent us.

This election will decide what kind of country we are -- and what kind of country we want to be. **The future of the Supreme Court and the Affordable Care Act are both on the line.**

This administration has made it clear that they're more concerned with hanging onto power however they can -- not with the wellbeing of the American people. They're trying to push through a Supreme Court nominee just weeks before the election, when millions of Americans have already cast their ballots. And they're doing their best to strip away health care coverage (including coverage for people with pre-existing conditions) in the middle of a global pandemic.

It's critical that we elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to turn the tide in Washington. But there's also a real path to turn the Senate blue this year, but to do that it's absolutely critical that we hold the seats we already have -- seats like Mark Warner's.

**[If you believe we need to keep Virginia blue and keep our Commonwealth-- and our country -- moving forward, please consider supporting Mark Warner's campaign. ](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da50/53d9897e/55a15c24/1c88f0fa/2925838872/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-scotusaca?refcode=20201012_f_1_nd__863__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Your donation is an investment in the future you want to see for Virginia. Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da50/53d9897e/55a15c24/1c88f0f9/2925838872/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg2MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-scotusaca?refcode=20201012_f_1_nd__863__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: The President Called Me Today
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.155174.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I received a call today from our President. It still hasn’t sunk in, really. I’m so humbled he called.
He wanted to tell me that he genuinely cares about the people of Pennsylvania. In my heart I always knew that, but to hear him say it is so encouraging! The excitement is real... but so is the challenge. We need to re-elect our President!
WE NEED YOU! If you have the availability, would you mind helping us out the last few days before the election and on Election Day? We want to cover as much ground as possible and show him that while he cares about Pennsylvanian’s, we care about him!
Please respond to this email if you are willing to help!
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.155174.aspx)
_P.S. _You can like our [Facebook ](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.155174.aspx)page [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.155174.aspx) , follow us on [Twitter](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.155174.aspx) [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.155174.aspx) , or contribute to my campaign at [www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.155174.aspx). Your contributions are greatly appreciated!
**[www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.155174.aspx)**

[To safely unsubscribe, please click here](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/Unsubscribe.aspx?eid=A3639956702C41A36C1D84C5E9E48DE8D6F8ADDE1A81DCAB16CED322485A90BC) | [Spam Policy](http://www.trailblz.com/spampolicy.aspx)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by mike@mikekellyforcongress.com
Mike Kelly For Congress | PO Box 476 | Lyndora | PA | 16045

name: Margaret Good for Congress
subject: need to know what you think
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20234394/256195356/-940294256?refcode=101220-voting-values-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDdjM2VlOS1kZDBjLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NP2N1swFu11T92hymmORhbBUPNxoFIEafeh-dUSuHvE=&emci=84068504-b90c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=6d7c3ee9-dd0c-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

With only three weeks remaining until Election Day, and with our race being neck and neck, I need to know where you stand on the upcoming election and on the issues we’re facing during this critical time for the Suncoast, our state, and our nation.
Friend,

With only three weeks remaining until Election Day, **and with our race being neck and neck** , I need to know where you stand on the upcoming election and on the issues we’re facing during this critical time for the Suncoast, our state, and our nation.

From Day One of this campaign I have listened to you, because that’s the only way I can represent you and your values. Now that politics is top of mind for most people, I would like to hear from you again as we approach Election Day.

**[Please, can you take this quick survey about the upcoming election and where you stand on the issues that impact our lives? subject: The GOP's misplaced priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OfnIFhOyFLu9U01Xj6KA8beEUKMjxmX43M61qxzIKjE=/AGdB9DuK65BE2H_YYTmm7uZ8B4-tn_lTdUGjnAbd2pQ=)
According to [a recent poll,](https://act.myngp.com/el/OfnIFhOyFLu9U01Xj6KA8beEUKMjxmX43M61qxzIKjE=/zS0Cv4N0s9HzYAj0fnyJw7f3oLqoXPjQri6WLWyYx7s=) _74 percent_ of voters think the Senate should prioritize COVID-19 relief _over_ appointing a new Supreme Court Justice. And _yet --_ Mitch McConnell began the confirmation process today, while the _Heroes Act_ collects dust on his desk.
My Congressional colleagues and I worked too damn hard for Senate Republicans to deny working Americans another stimulus check, an expanded child tax credit, $600 emergency UI, and rental assistance -- not to mention additional funding for state, local, and tribal governments. The _Heroes Act_ would help bolster our economy and offer critical support to millions of struggling Americans.
**Unfortunately, Senate Republicans have failed working people when they needed help the most. **
That's why we need to do _everything_ in our power to **keep** the House Blue, **take back** the White House, and **flip** _the Senate._ We need _strong leaders_ to navigate us through this health crisis and tackle the issues that are facing everyday Americans.
**As long as I represent the people of CA-38, I will fight tooth and nail to make sure working families have someone in their corner.**
**[Will you stand with me by chipping in anything you can to my re-election campaign today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/OfnIFhOyFLu9U01Xj6KA8beEUKMjxmX43M61qxzIKjE=/htscOzct2cFP6khA4gfUGVbkjprMpljHZlTE3ORMc2w=?refcode=X_101220_DirectAsk)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OfnIFhOyFLu9U01Xj6KA8beEUKMjxmX43M61qxzIKjE=/PVQ3-Xg08Z9bU40cI3j_PI-q1u-AE6ElxJr5-oBZSvU=?refcode=X_101220_DirectAsk)
Glad to have you in this fight,
_\-- Linda Sanchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OfnIFhOyFLu9U01Xj6KA8beEUKMjxmX43M61qxzIKjE=/0QZIFGjjbOPPjBR0-uj4K2d1hW0a-vIWPjEuaw_5OeQ=)

| | | Peter, We're in the final days of the campaign, and we need to make every hour count. **[Can you help make sure Rita finishes strong by donating today for her final 22 days of campaigning?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud7klF-Dn4ovg8D2J4D3xkUD8zw91NkW6IuAbbYBgBU=/MDIRQ3w9A35kIpWEZTADoF_fht3rF57eeVSKdKjcamk=?refcode=201012-email-pm)** \--Team Hart **\---- Forwarded Message -----** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud7klF-Dn4ovg8D2J4D3xkUD8zw91NkW6IuAbbYBgBU=/MDIRQ3w9A35kIpWEZTADoF_fht3rF57eeVSKdKjcamk=?refcode=201012-email-pm) Peter, We're now in the final stretch before the finish line of this campaign. Now that we have reached October, we have less than one month to send a real leader to Washington. We can't afford to leave anything up to chance in these final 22 days. Will you help us continue to hit our fundraising goals so we can keep reaching out to voters across the district? | ******[Make a Donation](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud7klF-Dn4ovg8D2J4D3xkUD8zw91NkW6IuAbbYBgBU=/MDIRQ3w9A35kIpWEZTADoF_fht3rF57eeVSKdKjcamk=?refcode=201012-email-pm)******
---
Our race is still a toss-up -- meaning it's anyone's to win. **[Can you help me stay ahead of my opponent and the D.C. interests backing her by making a donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud7klF-Dn4ovg8D2J4D3xkUD8zw91NkW6IuAbbYBgBU=/MDIRQ3w9A35kIpWEZTADoF_fht3rF57eeVSKdKjcamk=?refcode=201012-email-pm)**
In Congress, I will fight to keep our promises to our seniors by protecting Medicare and Social Security from reckless spending cuts. We can't let D.C. interests pull the rug out from under our friends and neighbors.
Seniors on fixed incomes, people with disabilities, rural hospitals and children need a leader who will look out for them - not corporate interests or Washington insider politics.
**[If you're ready for leadership that is really listening to our community, make a donation today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ud7klF-Dn4ovg8D2J4D3xkUD8zw91NkW6IuAbbYBgBU=/MDIRQ3w9A35kIpWEZTADoF_fht3rF57eeVSKdKjcamk=?refcode=201012-email-pm)**

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Keep Arkansas red: PLEDGE TO VOTE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
We are only three weeks from the election that will decide whether America remains free and great or we go down the path of socialism. Don't let anyone tell you that this election won't be close because it will be. That's why President Trump needs your vote and so do I. I'm proud of what I've accomplished my first term. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2NjQ1NjYS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDk5MzQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

We are only three weeks from the election that will decide whether America remains free or we go down the path of socialism.

Don't let anyone tell you that this election won't be close because it will be.

That's why President Trump needs your vote and so do I.

I'm proud of what I've accomplished my first term. Sanctioning China for sending fentanyl to Arkansas Ending the Obamacare mandate penalty that taxed 70,000 Arkansas families Confirming conservative judges that will protect our Second Amendment RightsBut we have more to do. We need to pull our manufacturing out of China and back to Arkansas. We need to confirm Amy Coney Barrett. And we need to FINISH THE WALL.

I can only do this if I win my election in just a few weeks. That's why I need your help.

Will you sign my pledge to vote Republican this election? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2NjQ1NjYS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDk5MzQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0
PLEDGE TO VOTE REPUBLICAN Voter: Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Pledge Status: MISSING

Sign Here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2NjQ1NjYS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDk5MzQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 You can vote early on October 19, one week from today.
Or you can request an absentee vote right now to safely vote before then. Click here to request a ballot: http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2NjQ1NjYS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDk5MzQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2NjQ1NjYS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDk5MzQ4MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 /

name: Bill Olson
subject: Puerto Ricans support MAGA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

Hi Peter,

Florida's 9th District has over 1/3 of the Puerto Ricans in Florida- and they will vote for me and President Trump!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I won because I support the President, and I will win the crucial Puerto Rican vote in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ
!

The Left always curses Republicans for winning the Hispanic vote in Florida. And why shouldn't we? We have done far more for the various Hispanic communities than the Dems have.

That is why President Trump will win Florida. And it is why I will win Florida's 9th District!

Florida's 9th is home to hundreds of thousands of Puerto Ricans- 1/3 of the total in Florida. In fact, one of my primary rivals is of Puerto Rican descent- and he has endorsed me!

Perhaps you may not have heard of the big news this week:

Puerto Rico Gov. Wanda Vázquez Garced (R) on Tuesday threw her support behind President Trump's bid for a second term and called on Puerto Ricans to cast their votes for him on Election Day.

“I ask all Puerto Ricans who are listening to go vote,” the governor said in an interview on Telemundo. “They have to go to vote, exercise their right to vote and evaluate who has represented being a person who thinks about Puerto Ricans and their needs at the most difficult moment. It is Donald Trump.”

According to the Puerto Rican newspaper El Nuevo Día, Vázquez Garced was scheduled to appear at a campaign event with Trump in central Florida last Friday, with the governor saying she had been invited to travel on Air Force One to hold a meeting on Puerto Rico.

Add all this up, and what does it mean? It means that Trump and Olson are headed to victory in Florida this year!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

I will say this for 2020, it has not been boring. But it has shown ALL the American people how important it is to vote Republican this Fall.

After all, Leftists are burning cities and assassinating cops. Who wants that? Most people aren't crazy like AOC, it turns out.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

The Puerto Rican community is alongside us. Trump will carry my district, and we need to get rid of Leftist Darren Soto. He claims to help Puerto Rico, but the only person he ever helps is himself- and maybe Nancy Pelosi!

I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

Trump needs Florida. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade. If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. That's why we must win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ
today? We need to stay up on TV- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hTJ0bXfyYF6OuRU&b=UN2xZuxxZJ_OjylzfKuxyQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

subject: Have you seen my conversation with Sean Fuecht?
body:
Watch this 15 minute conversation with Sean Feucht. | | | |
---
| **Watch the Conversation with Sean**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Have you seen my conversation with Sean Feucht? Sean is all over the news right now, he is leading worship rallies across the USA right now in support of religious freedoms, and he is a former candidate for US Congress & founder of Hold The Line. I talked with Sean about why it is so important for Christians, people of faith, those who love freedom, and any American, to vote & engage with politics, and why it is so important right now.

Watch the 15 minute interview and email me with any of your thoughts.

[Click this link to watch](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=e87a1af9c8&e=b78e7c4d40)**

**Also, I have been out walking door to door for Jim Oberweis, Jeanne Ives, and other candidates recently (with social distancing of course). Only 22 days until election day. I want to encourage you to donate some of your time in these last 3 weeks to help good conservative candidates in your area, and get out and vote! (Check out the pictures below.)

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=638b6ae67d&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=3a1df8cdeb&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Hackett?=
subject: Caught on camera: Jackie's dereliction of duty is inexcusable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Science-denier Jackie Walorski jeopardized the health of her constituents. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=37afaf0871&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | |
---
---
|
---
---
| Dear Friend,

The Elkhart County Health Department issued an alarming statement regarding the spike in COVID-19 cases this week, warning that the “community spread [is] coming back to exact a terrible toll on the people of this county—both in terms of illness and in death.”1

How does Jackie respond? She attends a Trump rally at the Elkhart County Courthouse without a mask, without any social distancing, and shaking hands. How do we know this? Because she proudly posted the above pictures on her Facebook page.

More than 350 COVID-19 deaths have been reported over the past month2, leaving Hoosier families grieving. Indiana set a new one-day case record on Saturday with 1,945 positive tests3. Elkhart General Hospital is at capacity and has no more rooms for COVID-19 patients.4

**Yet here stands science denier, Jackie Walorski, without a mask, standing shoulder-to-shoulder, hugging attendees, posing arm-in-arm for pictures with people at a rally for her own political gain. **

As a sitting congresswomen, Jackie’s dereliction of duty is inexcusable.

As Jackie recklessly ignores the advice of medical professionals and jeopardizes the health of her constituents, she continues to fight to take away healthcare for those with pre-existing conditions. [**Jackie is unfit for office.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c952908742&e=5886ca081d)

Pat stands ready to serve. Invest in a candidate who believes in science, evidence, and reason. Invest in Pat, and defeat the reckless abandonment of care for the people in this district.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Governor=20Kim=20Reynolds?=
subject: Can we count on your support?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| We are just weeks away from one of the most important elections in our lifetime, and I wanted to extend my heartfelt support and endorsement of Randy Feenstra for the 4th Congressional District. Randy’s work in the Iowa Senate has been critical to the success of our state.

We need conservative leaders like him in Congress, and that’s why I am asking you to help him succeed. Will you show him some support by contributing $5, $10, or $15 today?

---
| [Click here to contribute!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=4e800887ff&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to contribute!")
---
| I’ve known Randy for years; we were both county treasurers and were State Senators together. In that time, we’ve been able to accomplish so much for Iowa. He’s played a vital role in making Iowa one of the best managed states in the country, helping secure historic tax cuts, balancing the budget, and putting Iowa on strong financial footing despite significant challenges this year. Randy’s leadership is part of the reason Iowa has a budget surplus of over $300 million.
---
| [Click Here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=e22ef46137&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click Here")
---
| It’s exactly that kind of responsible, effective leadership that our country needs in Washington. In the State Senate, Randy delivered results for Iowa. We need Randy in Congress to do the same thing – balance the budget, defend our farm families and rural main streets, cut taxes and protect life. Join me in supporting him by chipping in $5 to help his campaign!
---
| [Chip in $5! ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=74a3d31e36&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip in $5! ")
---
| Thank you,

Governor Kim Reynolds
---
|

subject: 22 days
body:
We’re just 22 days away from election day |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=eccaf5a837&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| With just 22 days until the polls close on November 3rd, nearly 100,000 Vermonters have already cast their ballots. If you’re planning to vote by mail, make sure you do so as soon as possible to ensure it arrives to your town clerk on time. You can check the status of your ballot, including whether your town clerk has received it, [by clicking here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ad94815f9a&e=19cebfe173). You can also vote in person on or before November 3rd.

As we begin this final sprint, [your support is more important than ever](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d8f8b6abff&e=19cebfe173). We cannot take anything for granted.

Governor Phil Scott is working around the clock to manage Vermont through these uncertain times, and as we rebuild and recover, he’s got the right vision to lead our state forward.

We have an important fundraising deadline this week and we're short of our goal. [Can we count on you to chip in to make sure Governor Scott has what he needs to win this race](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=acca6bf824&e=19cebfe173), so Vermont’s focus remains on growing the economy and making Vermont more affordable for the next two years?

Anything you can contribute makes a huge difference.

Thank you for your continued support.
_Jason Maulucci
Campaign Manager
**[Phil Scott for Vermont](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=608911e85e&e=19cebfe173)**_

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: we can't come up short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
Right now, the Senate Republicans are doing everything they can to rush Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation to the Supreme Court ahead of the November election -- refusing to follow the precedent of the McConnell Rule they created themselves in 2016 and allowing the American people to have their next President sworn in before any vacancy on the Supreme Court is filled.
I am fighting back -- including by supporting Democratic candidates across the country in the fight to flip red seats blue and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.
**[In just a few days, we're facing a crucial mid-month fundraising deadline. With just weeks to go until Election Day, we can't come up short. Will you contribute $5 right now?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201012-midmonth-series?refcode=em201012i_4667&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I need your help. This is the last mid-month deadline before the election -- and I am counting on this grassroots team's support to keep fueling our fight to flip the Senate.
There is too much on the line in this election for us to slow down now. Will you join the fight?
**[My team set a $10,000 fundraising goal to keep our fight for the Senate -- and our future -- on track. Can I count on your $5 contribution to fuel a Democratic victory in 2020?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201012-midmonth-series?refcode=em201012i_4667&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Jacky

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201012-midmonth-series?refcode=em201012i_4667&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d8a28/4fbb2af3/20d6d85f/5e81a720/1736054236/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
